name: vmanage_performance_sla
label: Performance and SLA
description: Health-first performance dashboard: headline KPIs, SLA trends, traffic and interface utilization, capacity (TLOC, QoS, system resources), and control-plane drill-down.

dashboard_filters.extra_filter: (customer_tag is '{{CUST_TAG}}' or customer_tag is empty or customer_tag is '' or customer_tag is 'None')
